text:
Assistant: The existing agent renderer already is almost exactly the “full gimmick”: `<self>`, global agent capabilities, every workspace, and channel-member sessions with state/status/seen. So my strongest recommendation is to move that projection intact, simplify the surrounding grammar, and avoid designing a second briefing format. [...] - `my session` should reuse the existing full agent projection: self, available capabilities, workspaces, joined channels, and channel members.
- Do not add a separate `<sessions>` list—channel `<members>` already are the sessions. Keep available agent capabilities separate. [...] - Expand every workspace/channel the session has joined; keep merely known workspaces compact.
